rows.source_ref: "Demark Indicator Trading setups", thread started by StrategyCode with replies from Norok and Crust, ForexFactory Trading Systems forum, thread 316616, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/316616-demark-indicator-trading-setups (year n/a). Thread references an external attachment 'DeMark Indicators-Jason Perl.pdf' (Jason Perl, DeMark Indicators, Bloomberg Press) that is NOT included in this scrape.
rows.concept: Trend-reversal setups built on Thomas DeMark's TD indicators (e.g. TD Sequential/Combo), but the actual rules live only in an external attached PDF not present here.
rows.eligibility_reason: Thread contains no entry/exit rules or parameters; the setups are only referenced in an external attachment (Jason Perl book PDF) not included, and the post is an explicit commercial pitch to sell coded MT4 indicators.
rows.notes: 3-post thread, complete. Post 1 (StrategyCode) advertises coding DeMark indicators for MT4 'for a small fee'; posts 2-3 are interest/chatter, no rules. DeMark TD indicators are mechanical and would be re-harvestable IF the Jason Perl source PDF itself is obtained separately, but this file supplies nothing implementable.

notes: ForexFactory thread 316616, 3 posts, fully extracted via pdftotext. Actual DeMark setups reside in a referenced external attachment not included in this scrape; no implementable rules present in the thread text.
